title: 60个游戏的CSS资源连接！
name: diglog
note: With new technologies flooding the web,different tools are available with which a web designer can showcase his creativity and craft. But despite putting in the effort and sweat, numerous websites with fantastic creativity fail to get noticed. Also, the surge in designing is driving designers to dig for creativity, color schemes and layouts.Keeping these aspects in mind, we came up with a compendium of best CSS directories, CSS showcase, CSS galleries that rank / grade websites (using CSS) on the basis of ‘alexa ranking’, colors, categories, tags, ratings and RSS.If you feel that a particular site is worth to get showcased, then drop the URL’s in your comments so that they become a part of our next list.

title: YouTube视频“挖掘机”
tags: YouTube 视频 下载 软件
name: diglog
note:
YouTube Downloader的目的很单纯，就是挖掘YouTube视频，而且工作方式也异常简单，只需输入YouTube视频页面地址、选择本地保存地址和格式(AVI或MPEG)，点击一下“Start”按钮，就OK了。

YouTube Downloader是一款免费软件，不过其中捆绑了Dealio Comparision Shopping购物工具栏，安装时请注意选择是否需要。


YouTube Downloader is a free tool that downloads videos from youtube. 
YouTube Downloader allows you to easily grab and save desired youtube video to your local computer. Simply paste the URL of a video into the program, press Start , and the AVI file will be downloaded into the selected folder. 
You dont need any players to play flash video just play it on the defult media player clasic. YouTube Downloader is a completly FREE Software. It contains absolutely NO ADWARE, NO SPYWARE, Features: - Easy to use- Save youtube video as AVI file

title: 下载：Windows XP新稳定性补丁 (KB930916)
tags: Windows XP 稳定性 补丁
name: diglog
note:
这是一个可靠性方面的更新程序。 安装本更新程序可解决以下问题：在运行 Windows XP 的计算机上安装的第三方驱动程序可能会阻止您打开 NTFS 文件系统卷上的文件。

文件名： WindowsXP-KB930916-x86-CHS.exe 
版本： 930916 
发布日期： 2007/4/24 
语言： 简体中文 
下载大小： 777 KB

该补丁为Windows XP稳定性方面补丁，安装后可以解决以下问题：在运行 Windows XP 的计算机上安装的第三方驱动程序可能会阻止您打开 NTFS 文件系统卷上的文件。安装本更新程序后，可能需要重新启动计算机。

支持的操作系统： Windows XP Service Pack 2

title: 百度盲道上线
name: leni
note:
百度已于4月25日正式发布新产品：“百度盲道（http://dao.baidu.com/）”。这将是国内首款专门为视障人士开发的互联网产品。 

         百度有员工告诉记者，2年前，百度举行过一次征文比赛。其中一个小孩讲述自己教盲人父母上网的故事打动了他们。百度相关人士说，中国约有500万盲人，此外还有低视力者600多万。在国际上，搜索引擎等已成为盲人上网的主要应用。但在国内，尽管目前已有多款针对盲人使用的辅助软件，却因为缺乏专门的无障碍设计，盲人成为网络大潮中的“信息孤岛”，这是百度开发此产品的初衷。

title: Mac OS X和Windows上的最好的开源软件收集
name: diglog
note:
3D Canvas 3-D animation, modeling, rendering. Freeware 3D Graphics 
3DNA Alternative Windows Shell in 3-D. I thought these were cool, well amusing so I listed a few. Here is a screenshot of 3dna in action. Shareware Shell 
7Zip Zip utility with File Explorer support. GPL Utility 
AB Commander Lite File explorer replacement. Freeware/Other Utility 
AVG Anti-virus, free for non-commercial use. Freeware/Other Utility 
AVI Maker Makes avi video from images. Freeware Video 
AbiWord Word processor with all the bells and whistles! Highly recommended. GPL Office 
Acid Express Digital sequencer and loop based music production software, this is a Sony free download #B0( See Gungirl for a free alternative ;) Freeware/other Audio 
ActiveGrid Studio ActiveGrid Studio enables developers to rapidly build enterprise-level Web 2.0 applications with a minimum of training, time, and effort. Supports Java, PHP, Python. Database supports is the best I’ve seen in an open IDE. Has built in Python and Java environments plus a built in running Apache web server. Highly recommended. APL Programming 
Adaware Spyware removal tool. Freeware/Other Utility 
AlienGuise Theme engine like Windows Blinds, by the same guys, and brought to you from Alienware computer systems. Freeware Utility 
Anim8or 3-D animation, modeling, rendering. Freeware 3D Graphics 
AntiVir Anti-virus. I have been using this for awhile and it kicks ass. Beats the shit out of Norton and it’s free! Highly recommended. Freeware/Other Utility 
Apache Tomcat Apache Tomcat is the servlet container that is used in the official Reference Implementation for the Java Servlet and JavaServer Pages (jsp) technologies. ASF/GPL/Other Server 
Apache Web Server Web Server, the best imo. ASF/GPL/Other Server 
Apache2Triad Installs a developer preconfigured environment with Apache, PHP, mySQL with control panel/PHPMyAdmin, xMail, ftp, and a Apache Web based Control Panel, etc. Power packed with new cool things like Python/Pearl mods, ASP support, SSL and so much more. Highly recommended. GPL Server 
Aptana Development environment geared towards web development, Ajax style! Autocomplete and assistance for HTML, CSS, Java Script. GPL Programming 
Arbaro Make 3-D trees. GPL 3D Graphics 
ArtRage Natural Painting Application, like Painter. and so worth the download! Freeware 2D Graphics 
Audacity Wav editor with VST support and can export to mp3. Highly recommended. GPL Audio 
Avast Anti-virus applcation. Free for personal use. I have not tried this software, but it works with Kerio so it can’t be bad. Freeware/Other Utility 
Avidemux Video editor. GPL Video 
BRL-CAD The BRL-CAD package is a powerful Constructive Solid Geometry (CSG) solid modeling system with over 20 years development and production use by the U.S. military. Visit the project page for downloads. GPL 3D Graphics 
Balthisar Cascade 2.0 CSS level 2 editor available for the Windows platform. Freeware Programming 
BartPE Windows live cd. Now you can boot Windows from a CD-Rom and have full read/write access to NTFS volumes!. Freeware Utility 
Bid O Magic EBay bidding/selling utility. GPL Web 
BitTorrent Multipeer downloading! GPL Peer2Peer 
BitTyrant BitTorrent protocol compatible client. Faster than traditional BitTorrent, read more on their site. GPL Peer2Peer 
Black Box Alternative Windows Shell. I found this to be more stable than XOBlite2. http://www.bb4win.org/news.php GPL Shell 
Black Box Lean Alternative Windows Shell. GPL Shell 
Blender 3-D 3-D modeling, design\illustration, animation, game development. I like to call it the Free Maya 3-D! Highly recommended. GPL 3D Graphics 
BlitzMax IDE Basic programming IDE for use with the Blitz game development environment. Public Domain Programming 
Blueberry Alternative Windows Shell in 3-D. LGPL Shell 
Boa Constructor A visual GUI designer and IDE for Python GPL Programming 
Boot manager/partition manager Partition magic like clone and boot manager. GPL Utility 
Burn4Free CD/DVD burner application, works oh so well! p.s. Run Adaware after installing to remove the spyware piece ;) Freeware Utility 
Burst A bittorrent creation and management tool! Highly recommended. GPL Peer2Peer 
CD Image ISO ripper. Like UltraISO, create convert disk images. Supports all the main images types. GPL Utility 
CD burner XP CD Burner. Freeware Utility 
Cdexos CDex a CD-Ripper, thus extracting digital audio data from an Audio CD. The application supports many Audio encoders, like MPEG (MP2,MP3), VQF, AAC encoders. Highly recommended. GPL Audio 
Celtx Celtx is a comprehensive software package designed for people who work in the film, TV, theatre, and new media industries. It combines full-feature scriptwriting with media rich pre-production support and enables online collaboration. MPL Office 
Chronicle Lite Blog client that works with xmlrpc - works with Drupal and any other blogapi supporting blog. GPL Web 
Cinepaint Image editor geared for video production. GPL 2D Graphics 
Clam Win Anti-virus program. GPL Utility 
ClamAV Anti-virus program. GPL Utility 
ClipRex DVD player with codex. Freeware Video 
Clockwise3d Alternative Windows Shell in 3-D. Freeware Shell 
ConText Programmers text editor, supports most languages, shell scripts, plugin support. Freeware Programming 
Cooktop XML editor. Freeware Programming 
Crap Cleaner Cleans up Windows, internet cache, temp files, registry entries, etc. Also has a kick ass uninstaller that works and a startup editor. Highly recommended. Freeware Utility 
Crimson editor Programmers text editor. Features tabbed interface, html, php, c, python syntax highlighting, code output window, and built in FTP! Highly recommended. Freeware Utility 
Cygwin Cygwin is a Linux-like environment for Windows. GPL Utility 
Cygwin/x Cygwin/x allows x11 (Linux apps) to run on Windows. GPL Utility 
DVDShrink DVD compression for burning DVD data to cdr. Also, you will need some things here. Highly recomm ended. Freeware Video 
Daisy Windows updater replacement that does not use IE settings. GPL Utility 
Deep-Paint Painting application similar to Painter. Man, I remember when this sold for $800.00! Freeware/Other 2D Graphics 
Delineate Raster to Vector coverter. Nice GPL 2D Graphics 
Democracy Player Best damned video player! Play virtually any video-- Quicktime, WMV, MPEG, AVI, XVID, and more. Video blog, YouTube, hell it does everything including BitTorrent. GPL Video 
Dia Basically Visio. GPL Office 
Dogwaffle Natural painting application similar to Open Canvas. It limited, but pretty full featured at the same time. Freeware/Other 2D Graphics 
Dorgem Video/webcam capture. GPL Video 
Doubletype Font creation application. GPL Font 
Dr Divx Officially the unofficial DivX encoding tool to create DivX media files for playback on DivX hardware and software players. LGPL Video 
Dusty Dusty is a nice realtime 3D Smoke Simulator. It allowes to simulate smoke and fire in realtime. GPL 3D Graphics 
EMule Peer2peer client for file sharing! GPL Peer2Peer 
EMule Plus Peer2peer client for file sharing with added features! GPL Peer2Peer 
EZThumbs Batch thumbnail creator. Freeware 2D Graphics 
EasyPHP Really nice Apache install with PHP and mySQL included and configured. If you need a heavy duty Apache web development environment look at Apache2Triad. GPL Server 
Eclipse Eclipse java IDE for Windows. GPL Programming 
EmailXT EmailXT is an open, patent-free protocol that replaces your current email with a more secure, full-featured system. EmailXT is a relationship-based email system where unauthorized bulk emailing is no longer possible. No more spam and mass mailing viruses. You don’t need spam filters or service subscriptions any more. GPL Web 
Envelop VBasic Visual Basic clone; compiles to exe, gui designer! GPL Programming 
Ethereal Packet sniffer. GPL Utility 
Ewido Blocks spyware/adware and trojans. Freeware/Other Security 
Explore2fs Let’s you see and explore a Linux partition, and do file operations, from Windows. Highly recommended if you dual boot. GPL Utility 
ExplorerXP Windows File Explorer replacement. Freeware/Other Utility 
FS-driver Mount Linux Ext2/Ext3 file systems on Windows. Freeware Utility 
FarPy Awesome wxPython and .Net GUI designer. GPL Programming 
Feedreader News aggregator that supports RSS and ATOM formats. GPL Web 
FileZilla FTP Server and client. Highly recommended. GPL Web 
Filseclab Internet personal firewall - Nice Freeware/Other Security 
FireFox Tune This will automatically tune Firefox for speed. Damn, I tuned manually, but this thing sped it up three times as much. It worked wonders on verion 1.04 of Firefox. Freeware Web 
Firebird database Nice database. Like Access. GPL Database 
Flac Lossless audio compression tool. Rips tracks without the quality loss like you find in mp3 format. GPL Audio 
Flame Fractal Flames are algorithmically generated images and animations. GPL 2D Graphics 
Flashdevelop Actionscript 2 IDE with seamless swfmill and MTASC integration. FlashDevelop is the first alternative opensource IDE to feature AS3 & MXML completion, including Flex2 compiler integration (the best compiler integration after Adobe FB) and AS3 syntax checking. Highly recommended. Requires .Net. MIT/Other Programming 
Flock Web browser based on Firefox with blogging utilities built in

title: 下载详细信息： Microsoft Office Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 2007 文件格式兼容包
tags: Microsoft Office Word Excel PowerPoint 2007 文件 格式 兼容包
name: diglog
note:
采用 Microsoft Office Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 2007 新增的文件格式打开、编辑和保存文档、工作簿和演示文稿。

我们知道，微软最新的办公软件套装Office 2007引入了新的Office Open XML 格式，导致无法向下兼容，老版本的Office无法打开Office 2007创建的文档。近日，微软放出了Office 2007格式兼容包，可以解决这一问题。

Office 2000、XP或2003用户安装Office 2007格式兼容包后，就可以打开、编辑和保存由Word 2007、Excel 2007和PowerPoint 2007创建的新格式文件。

Word提供兼容的新格式有：

Word 2007 文档 (*.docx)  
启用了宏的 Word 2007 文档 (*.docm)

Excel提供兼容的新格式有：

Excel 2007 二进制工作簿 (*.xlsb) 
Excel 2007 工作簿 (*.xlsx) 
启用了宏的 Excel 2007 工作簿 (*.xlsm) 
Excel 2007 模板 (*.xltx) 
启用了宏的 Excel 2007 模板 (*.xltm) 
Excel 2007 加载项 (*.xlam)

PowerPoint提供兼容的新格式有：

PowerPoint 2007 演示文稿 (*.pptx) 
启用了宏的 PowerPoint 2007 演示文稿 (*.pptm) 
PowerPoint 2007 模板 (*.potx) 
启用了宏的 PowerPoint 2007 模板 (*.potm) 
PowerPoint 2007 放映 (*.ppsx) 
启用了宏的 PowerPoint 2007 放映 (*.ppsm)

提前知道两个月内即将上映的影片 
用手机或者邮箱的形式接收电子影票（不收取任何费用），在影片 开场前，通过网票网在影院设置的出票机直接取票进场观影即可。非常的方便。
